heroSubtitle: The design, text, and media assets on our website are available to download or stream. We have also prepared a few other helpful tools. Our heart is to share what we have so that many people will be equipped to pray for Japan.
copyrightText: We have applied a <0>Creative Commons BY-NC-SA 4.0 license</0> to all our assets. We welcome you to freely use, adapt, or redistribute these resources, with attribution to this website. <1>Please read more about the permissions of this license here.</1>
byMediaAltText: TODO A picture of media types
byMediaDescriptions: The following resources are available to download by media type. Please note that clicking on the resource buttons will take you to an external website (Box) to download.
You may also <0>find and stream all of the prayer videos here.</0>
byMediaOtherVersionText: Access the Japanese versions of these resources <0>here</0>.
byTopicDescriptions: You can also download resources by topic. These resources are also available as individuals links at the bottom of each topic page.
tutDescription: Please note that clicking on the resource buttons will take you to an external website (Box). Follow the instructions below to download resources.
tut1Descriptions: Sort by "Name" to find specific files easily. Hover over each file you want to download and click on the "Select" box.
tut2Descriptions: Click the download icon on the top right of the page.
tut3Descriptions: Your files can be found wherever you normally access downloads through your browser or computer.
referencesDescription: Credits and references for this website are available to view <0>here</0>. References by topic are also available on each topic page.
title: Coming soon.
